name: Frozen Choc-Chip Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups chocolate chip cookies, finely crushed
1 cup chocolate fudge sauce, slightly softened
8 cups chocolate chip ice cream, slightly softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9-inch pan with foil.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the crushed cookies and melted margarine or butter. Mix well.
3. Press the mixture into the foil-lined pan. Freeze for 20 minutes or until cold.
4. Spread 1 cup of chocolate fudge sauce over the crust. Freeze for 30 minutes or until firm.
5. In a large bowl, combine the ice cream and marshmallows. Spoon and spread over the fudge sauce.
6. Cover; freeze for at least 4 hours or overnight.
7. Drizzle or serve with caramel topping. Store any remaining dessert in the freezer.
